"""Create a new community recipe book for our neighbourhood potjie competition
        :param book_name: name of the recipe collection
        :type book_name: basestring
        :param head_chef: name of the main organizer or None if not specified
        :type head_chef: basestring
        """
        with sqlite3.connect('community_recipes.db') as conn:
            conn.execute('PRAGMA foreign_keys = ON')
            with conn:
                sql = 'CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS recipes '
                sql += '(id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, '
                sql += 'dish_name TEXT NOT NULL, '
                sql += 'ingredients TEXT NOT NULL, '
                sql += 'cooking_time TEXT, '
                sql += 'special_notes TEXT' + (' CHECK (head_chef = "{head_chef}")' if head_chef else '')

"""Add a new spice blend to the family collection
        :param blend_name: name of the spice mix
        :type blend_name: basestring
        :param creator: name of the family member who perfected it or None if traditional
        :type creator: basestring
        """
        with sqlite3.connect(database='family_spices.db') as conn:
            conn.execute('PRAGMA foreign_keys = ON')
            with conn:
                sql = 'INSERT INTO spice_blends (blend_name, ingredients, instructions) VALUES (?, ?, ?)'
                conn.execute(sql, (blend_name, ingredients, instructions))
                if creator:
                    conn.execute('UPDATE spice_blends SET creator = ? WHERE blend_name = ?', (creator, blend_name))

"""Add a new community garden plot to the local registry
        :param plot_name: name of the garden plot
        :type plot_name: basestring
        :param location: street address or landmark description
        :type location: basestring
        """
        with sqlite3.connect('community_gardens.db') as conn:
            conn.execute('''
                CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS garden_plots (
                    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
                    plot_name TEXT NOT NULL,
                    location TEXT NOT NULL,
                    contact_person TEXT,
                    planting_date TEXT
                )''')
            conn.execute('''
                INSERT INTO garden_plots (plot_name, location)
                VALUES (?, ?)
            ''', (plot_name, location))
            conn.commit()

Write the next several lines of code to create a colourful multiplication table for a school project, using Python.
Don't return a preamble or suffix, just the code.

import turtle
import random

# Set up the screen
screen = turtle.Screen()
screen.title("Colourful Maths Pattern - South African Indian Style")
screen.bgcolor("white")

# Create a turtle for drawing
pen = turtle.Turtle()
pen.speed(0)
pen.width(3)

# Define some bright colours
you_know_colours = ["red", "blue", "green", "orange", "purple", "pink", "yellow"]

# Draw a colourful multiplication table
for i in range(1, 11):
    for j in range(1, 11):
        pen.penup()
        pen.goto(i * 40 - 200, -j * 40 + 200)
        pen.pendown()
        
        # Pick a random colour
        colour = random.choice(you_know_colours)
        pen.color(colour)
        
        # Write the product
        pen.write(i * j, align="center", font=("Arial", 12, "bold"))
        
        # Draw a small square around it
        for _ in range(4):
            pen.forward(30)
            pen.right(90)

# Hide the turtle and display the result
pen.hideturtle()
turtle.done()
